rationale_source: F3.BR multi-correction race: 3 corrections within ~75 minutes to same field; canonical_map resolution per Layer 3 #21
_verification_profile_rationale: LIST-C-Q10-RENOTIFY (BATCH 12). Multi-correction race: the premature intake prelim shows the event_0 value; Vienna does not re-render post-correction. Final canonical $295k (last-write-wins) verified via the Q10 [UPDATED] notice + ack (PRIMARY) / extracted_data (SECONDARY) per broker_correction surface (0c826b9). Q10 firing on the 3-turn multi-correction VERIFIED end-to-end (C07 probe, BATCH 12: '[UPDATED] Prelim correction — Marcus Webb: requested loan amount corrected', q10fields=['requested loan amount']).

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Per Layer 3 #21 recommended-default (a) last-write-wins: event_2 ($295k) is latest; canonical resolves to $295k.

must_include.rationale: Prelim fires (premature, at intake) and renders the borrower. The final $295k is NOT asserted here — the premature intake prelim shows the event_0 value and Vienna does not re-render post-correction. Final canonical resolution is verified via the broker_correction surface + the Q10 notice below.

Q10 (a5c032c) re-notifies admin of the final corrected loan amount (last-write-wins). VERIFIED end-to-end (C07 probe, BATCH 12): '[UPDATED] Prelim correction — Marcus Webb: requested loan amount corrected', q10fields=['requested loan amount']. NOTE: superseded values ($280k/$310k) suppression is verified via the canonical broker_correction resolution to $295k, not via the premature prelim (which legitimately renders an intake value).

layer3_pending_decisions.scope: multi-correction race resolution semantic (last-write-wins vs rate-limit vs admin disambiguation)
